data.name: Cuckold Sex - Episode 7
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.

A physical checkup spirals into a steamy affair when Lily reveals the secrets of her open marriage to the charming and insatiable Doctor Martin.

Will James catch them in the act?

GAME DESCRIPTION

Join Lily and James on their quest to spice up their marriage.

EPISODE 7

A pregnancy scare sends Lily and James into the capable hands of Doctor Martin. Relieved by the negative results, they think their worries are behind them. Yet, ever thorough, the charming doctor insists on a physical exam to ensure all is well and prevent future scares.

 

As Lily divulges the details of their open marriage and bares herself to his eager eyes, Doctor Martin's professional demeanor begins to crumble, overtaken by a powerful desire. Determined to have her at all costs, he uses every ounce of his charm to seduce her, undeterred by her husband waiting just beyond the glass partition.

Will Lily surrender to the doctor’s advances?

Will James catch them in the heat of the moment?

Dive into this steamy story to find out.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
